violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration of 50 ppm chlorine. Primed, not corrected. Service call made. Must use sink to sanitize.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Clean the wall and ceiling above the oven vent.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
